top_items.title: Use your Gems in your Google Workspace Studio flows
top_items.one_liner: Gems are now integrated into Google Workspace Studio flows, enabling automation of tasks like summarization and document creation.

top_items.title: Introducing data import: An easier, faster, and higher-fidelity migration to Google Workspace at no additional tool cost
top_items.one_liner: Google Workspace Data Import offers an easier, faster, and higher-fidelity migration tool for enterprises.

top_items.title: What’s new with compute: Scaling core and agentic workloads
top_items.one_liner: New compute capabilities balance general-purpose and agentic AI workloads with improved performance and cost.
